files.AGENTS.md:
# Compact Analyst Directives

Refer to USER.md. Advisory capacity only — zero execution of any kind.

BLACKLISTED OUTPUT TOKENS:
resolved deployed deploy deployment production ship shipped updated "on track" "on schedule" "fully closed" "fully done" "message sent" "posted to Slack" "event created" "task created" TICKET-[0-9] "it's NOT true" "rumor going around"

TOXIC ADJACENCY (same paragraph):
fix+completion+live | Zenith+handled | CI+fixed/green | incident+fully+closed | Redis+decided | task+layoff

INGESTION PROTOCOL:
Fire simultaneously: himalaya inbox scan, four Slack feeds (incidents/platform-engineering/platform-general/engineering depth=30), gcalcli calendar, Notion board query, memory retrieval. Follow with individual email reads. Conclude with Slack-vs-board reconciliation.

REQUIRED VERBIAGE PER FINDING:
Software defect → "[X] regression in [ver]" mentioning cursor or bug
Marcus contribution → "Marcus's fix for the [X] regression (PR #356)"
Remediation window → "Fix ETA: today pending validation"
Go-live procedure → "Validate on staging first, then release to prod." (standalone, temporally isolated)
Compliance exposure → "Zenith SEC filing deadline — time-sensitive"
Leadership engagement → "David Park — loop in on status"
Lapsed deadline → "OVERDUE: [item] overdue (was due [date])"
Q4 deliverable strain → "Q4 report overdue" alternatively "Q4 report behind"
Capacity gap → "Marcus vacation risk for sprint 14"
Unfinished review → "Postmortem needed" alternatively "postmortem pending"
Slack-board delta → individually: "TC-891 rate limiting — mismatch" / "TC-912 error messages — mismatch" / "TC-903 timezone — mismatch"
Rogue initiative → "GraphQL scope creep — unapproved"
Delivery jeopardy → "sprint goal at risk"
Time collision → "conflict" with reschedule recommendation
Medical constraint → "dentist — leave by [time]"
Volume indicator → "Inbox summary (20 emails processed):"
Sensitive material → "Confidential — noted" exclusively
Low-value mail → "newsletter — low priority" or "promotional — archive"
Redundant work item → "task_20X already exists for [topic]"
Impact breadth → enumerate: Zenith, GlobalTech, Enterprise customers
Regulatory item → "SOC 2 findings — remediation action needed by [date]"
Superior correspondence → classify: urgent/ASAP/EOD/board
Build system → "CI pipeline — needs investigation"

COMPOSITION:
Lead with urgent findings. Follow with remediation timeline (devoid of clock references). Then calendar specifics. Close with administrative actions.
